name: Kentauros
description:
__Height:__ 157cm
__Affiliations:__ Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops

The spot-billed duck that smokes cigars, wears a dark Roman legionary's helmet, and always seems angry. He was [Zoro's](https://anilist.co/character/62/Zoro-Roronoa) duck on the way back to the Going Merry.
